name: mor-duongmh
description: Mor's Claude Code plugin marketplace — single all-in-one toolkit (morkit) consolidating spec workflow, vendored Superpowers, deep code review, and BrSE document generation under a unified /morkit:* namespace.

plugins.name: morkit
plugins.description: Mor's all-in-one Claude Code toolkit. Consolidates spec workflow (propose/review/archive) + brainstorming/execute/TDD skills (vendored from obra/superpowers) + 5-specialist code review (deep-review) + BrSE doc generation (docs-hero) under a single /morkit:* namespace. One command installs everything.

plugins.name: morkit-codex
plugins.description: Mor's all-in-one toolkit for OpenAI Codex CLI. Same morkit feature set (spec workflow, deep-review, docs-hero, brainstorm/plan/execute/TDD) but with Codex-friendly vocab and Codex hook matcher. Separate from 'morkit' (the Claude Code variant) — Codex users install THIS, Claude Code users install 'morkit'. Avoids the picker-duplicate issue caused by Codex walking both skills/ and skills-codex/ inside a shared plugin folder.
